corners.name: Tarzanbocht (Tarzan)
corners.notes: Iconic tight hairpin at the end of the main straight. Only realistic overtaking spot.

corners.name: Scheivlak
corners.notes: Blind high-speed corner on the sea-side of the circuit.

corners.name: Arie Luyendijkbocht
corners.notes: The banked Turn 3; 18° banking. Drivers can take the outer line.

corners.name: Hans Ernst Bocht (banked)
corners.notes: Banked final corner (19°) leading onto main straight.
